examples: It will not befit a priest to act uncharitably.
"You're not even Jewish," her mother said, not a little uncharitably.
“You’re not even Jewish, ” her mother said, not a little uncharitably.
His approach is often parodied, somewhat uncharitably, as making AAA in the mould of B-movies.
One analyst uncharitably compares his appointment to hiring the boss of a big charity to do a corporate turnaround.
